response.overview: Yon and Dany run in terror through one of the vast wheat fields found in the Vilcanota mountain range. They head toward the only visible refuge: an abandoned cabin. Yon, who is in front and has a leg injury, forces the door open, while Dany, following behind, trips and falls to the ground. Yon manages to open the door, and Dany runs for her life. She narrowly avoids being trapped and enters the house. Yon and Dany desperately try to prevent the door from falling. The attack is ferocious. Dany is terrified, and Yon can only murmur a few prayers. Suddenly, the attack stops. There is a figure painted on the wall: a fox carrying a reptile in its mouth. Yon and Dany have a moment of respite, allowing them to consider their options. Dany has lost her cell phone while running, and in the middle of a tense argument between them, it rings from outside the house. Their only hope of rescue lies outside. Yon can't walk, and after some arguing, he manages to convince Dany to take the phone.
response.title: ​​​Wayquis
